title: Control Attestation SD-JWT VC Schema
description: Schema for the Control Attestation encoded as SD-JWT VC, based on the WeBuild Control Attestation Rulebook and draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-09. Records all natural persons, legal entities, and legal arrangements exercising direct or indirect control over a legal entity.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type — uniquely identifies the credential type as per SD-JWT VC Section 3.2.2.1. Always present in plain text. NOT selectively disclosable.

iss.description: Issuer identifier — URI identifying the issuer of the credential. As per RFC 7519 and SD-JWT VC Section 3.2.2.2. NOT selectively disclosable.

iat.description: Issued At — Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when the attestation was issued. As per RFC 7519. NOT selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiration Time — Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) after which the attestation is no longer valid. As per RFC 7519. NOT selectively disclosable.

nbf.description: Not Before — Unix timestamp before which the credential MUST NOT be accepted. Optional. As per RFC 7519. NOT selectively disclosable.

sub.description: Subject — identifier for the subject legal entity whose control structure is described. As per SD-JWT VC Section 3.2.2.2. NOT selectively disclosable.

issuing_entity.description: Identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation (subject entity for EAA or QTSP for QEAA). NOT selectively disclosable.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation under eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA' (self-issued) or 'QEAA' (issued by a QTSP). NOT selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the schema used for this attestation. Optional metadata. NOT selectively disclosable.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL where the trust anchor for verifying this attestation can be retrieved. Optional metadata.

cnf.description: Confirmation claim — used to bind the credential to a holder key as per SD-JWT VC Section 3.2.2.2 and RFC 7800. NOT selectively disclosable.

jwk.description: JSON Web Key representing the holder's public key.

status.description: Status claim for revocation checking. MUST be present if the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours. As per SD-JWT VC Section 3.2.2.2. NOT selectively disclosable.

type.description: The type of status mechanism. SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential document containing the status bitstring.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. SHALL be 'revocation'.

_sd_alg.description: Hash algorithm used for selective disclosure digests. SHALL be 'sha-256'. As per SD-JWT VC spec.

controller.description: Array of Controller entries. SHALL contain at least one entry. At least one entry SHALL be of type 'Person'. MUST be selectively disclosable (SD claim).

Controller.title: Controller
Controller.description: A natural person, legal entity, or legal arrangement exercising direct or indirect control over the subject legal entity.

type.description: Discriminator — SHALL be 'Person' or 'Entity'. Determines which sub-object (person or entity) is present.

jurisdiction.description: Country of legal relevance for this controller entry. SHALL follow ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

person.description: Present when type = 'Person'. The entity object SHALL be absent.

entity.description: Present when type = 'Entity'. The person object SHALL be absent.

address.description: Residential address for Person, registered address for Entity.

controls.description: Describes how control is exercised by this controller.

effective_date.description: Date when this control relationship became legally effective. SHALL follow ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.

evidence.description: At least one piece of supporting evidence substantiating the declared control.

Person.title: Person
Person.description: A natural person exercising control. Present only when Controller.type = 'Person'.

first_name.description: First name(s) of the natural person controller, including middle name(s) where applicable.

surname.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the natural person controller.

birth_date.description: Date of birth of the natural person controller. OPTIONAL but SHOULD be included where available. ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.

Entity.title: Entity
Entity.description: A legal entity or legal arrangement exercising control. Present only when Controller.type = 'Entity'.

category.description: Classification of the entity. SHALL be 'legal_entity' or 'legal_arrangement'.

name.description: Complete official registered name of the entity or legal arrangement.

identifier.description: At least one of euid, lei, tax, or other SHALL be present.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 jurisdiction in which the entity is registered or legally domiciled.

form.description: Legal form of the entity. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.6.

EntityIdentifier.title: EntityIdentifier
EntityIdentifier.description: Legal identifier(s) for the entity. At least one of euid, lei, tax, or other SHALL be present.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier per ISO 17442 — 20-character alphanumeric code — optional.

tax.description: National tax or registration number — optional.

other.description: Any other applicable legal identifier — optional.

SubtypeInfo.title: SubtypeInfo
SubtypeInfo.description: Additional information for legal arrangements. Mandatory when entity.category = 'legal_arrangement' or entity.form = 'trust'.

settlement.description: Instrument or document establishing the legal arrangement (e.g., trust deed, founding charter).

purpose.description: Declared purpose of the legal arrangement.

assets.description: Description of assets held within the legal arrangement.

reason_for_registration.description: Reason the legal arrangement was formally registered — optional.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Address of the controller. Residential for Person, registered for Entity.

Controls.title: Controls
Controls.description: Describes the mechanism, level, and basis through which control is exercised.

type.description: Array of one or more control mechanism types. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.3. At least one value required.

level.description: How control is held. SHALL be one of: 'direct', 'indirect', 'joint', or 'unknown'. See Section 2.8.2.

basis.description: Legal or structural basis for control. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.4.

voting_percentage.description: Percentage of voting rights held. Decimal value in range 0–100. Optional. Use null where voting rights are not applicable.

appointment_rights.description: Free text details on appointment rights held by this controller. Optional.

other_details.description: Free text description of other control mechanisms not captured by structured fields. Optional.

rights.description: Array of economic rights associated with the control. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.5.

Evidence.title: Evidence
Evidence.description: Supporting documentation substantiating the declared control relationship.

id.description: Unique identifier, URI, or URN of the source or evidence document.

type.description: Type of evidence document. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.9.

url.description: URI reference to the publicly accessible source document. Optional.

data.description: Base64-encoded source document. SHALL be provided if url is absent or not publicly accessible. Optional.
